name: .noise

parameters.name: outvar
parameters.description: Output voltage node or pair, e.g. V(out) or V(out,ref).

parameters.name: srcnam
parameters.description: Independent source treated as the noise input reference.

parameters.name: interval
parameters.description: Optional print interval for intermediate noise summaries.

dialectNotes: Requires a companion .AC statement. Reports total output noise and equivalent input noise.
